Waf build system components, setup scripts, and configuration tools.

## Folders
- **[waflib](waflib/README.md)**: Waf build system components, tools, extensions, and utilities for compiler integration, task management, and error handling.
- **[zip](zip/README.md)**: A script to set up the environment and execute the Waf build system using a zipped library.

## Files
- **[waf-light](waf-light.md)**: A script for unpacking and setting up the Waf build system environment.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: A script for configuring and building the Waf build system, including options for customization and tool integration.
